description.value:
This pair of huge wings is crafted from numerous feathers made of a lightweight, golden magical alloy. When activated, the wings emit a melodic sound and a shimmering glow.

Activate—Assisted Flight 2 (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect For the next 10 minutes, you can [[/act leap]] 20 feet, using the wings to propel yourself. You must land on a space with solid ground. For the duration, you also emit a bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for the next 20 feet. You take a –2 item penalty to Stealth checks to [[/act hide]] and [[/act sneak]].

You can also use an action to flap the wings to glide slowly toward the ground, 5 feet down and up to 20 feet forward through the air. As long as you spend 1 action gliding each round and haven't yet reached the ground, you remain in the air at the end of your turn.

You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed or 25 feet, whichever is greater, for the duration.
